name: Sitka Sound Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped parsley OR 2 tbsp dried parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart pot, sauté onions, green peppers, and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Add tomato sauce, spices, water, bay leaves, salt, thyme, marjoram, and tabasco to the pot. Stir well.
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer, cover, and cook for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat, add white wine, and continue cooking uncovered for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Return the pot to the heat, add halibut pieces, clams, and shrimp. Cook until the clam shells open (about 10 minutes).
6. Add crab chunks or abalone and cook until heated through.
7. Serve with garlic bread and a green salad. Serves 6.
Mary, Sitka, Alaska
Source: Alaska Seafood Cookbook
